zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de BRIENNE於1280年出生在法國德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧時，她的父親Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu31歲，母親Beatrix de Chatillon26歲。她於1314年8月12日與Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1325年3月20日享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de BRIENNE was born in 1280, in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France, her father, Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu, was 31 and her mother, Beatrix de Chatillon, was 26. She married Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny on 12 August 1314. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 20 March 1325, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de BRIENNE est née en 1280, à Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France, son père, Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Chatillon, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny le 12 août 1314. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1325, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de BRIENNE 1280 in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu 31 und ihre Mutter Beatrix de Chatillon 26. Sie hat am 12. August 1314 Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. März 1325 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de BRIENNE è nata il nel 1280 nel Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Beatrix de Chatillon, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny il 12 agosto 1314. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1325, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de BRIENNEが1280年にフランスグランド エストアウベブリーネ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Jean I de Brienne Count of Euは31歳，母Beatrix de Chatillonは26歳であった。1314年8月12日にSeigneur Renauld de Picquignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1325年3月20日に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de BRIENNE(이)가 1280년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 브리니-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix de Chatillon(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1314년 8월 12일 Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1325년 3월 20일 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de BRIENNE nasceu em 1280, em Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Chatillon, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny em 12 de agosto de 1314. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de março de 1325, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de BRIENNE родилась в 1280 г. в местности бриенне-ле-чaто, ауб, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Chatillon, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny 12 августа 1314 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 марта 1325 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de BRIENNE nació en 1280, en Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Jean I de Brienne Count of Eu, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Chatillon, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Seigneur Renauld de Picquigny el 12 de agosto de 1314. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1325, a la edad de 45 años.
